case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. BYRON GABRIEL PEREZ PAVON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-19-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BYRON GARIEL PEREZ PAVON DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 SERVED NOV-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAVON, BYRON GABRIEL PEREZ
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BYRON GABRIEL PEREZ PAVON DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAVON, BYRON GABRIEL PEREZ $1,619.87 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,724.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,619.87 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PAVON, BYRON GABRIEL PEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
